prompt: Implement a Flappy Bird clone for the kloopik portal. Create games/flappy/game.html and add the catalog entry to src/_data/games.json.

assertions.description: game.html file exists and is non-empty (>100 chars)
catalog_entry.json exists and contains all 8 required fields: slug, title, category, description, emoji, controls, howToPlay, about
GameSDK.showAd() called inside init() / startup function (pre-roll ad)
GameSDK.showAd() called on game over (interstitial ad)
GameSDK.save() called with highScore in the payload
onSaveLoaded() function is defined and restores highScore
requestAnimationFrame used for the main game loop (not setInterval)
Bird has gravity (velocity increases downward each frame) and upward flap on input
Pipe/obstacle objects scroll from right to left with gap for bird to pass through
Background color is dark (#000, #0a0a0f, or similar)
